scripts.setup: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix mobile ci
scripts.dev:all: npm run supabase:start && concurrently -k -n backend,mobile -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:android: npm run supabase:start && concurrently -k -n backend,mobile -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:mobile:emulator"
scripts.dev:services: npm run supabase:start && npm run dev:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:mobile
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix backend run lint:fix && npm --prefix mobile run lint:fix
scripts.format: npm --prefix backend run format && npm --prefix mobile run format
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix backend run format:check && npm --prefix mobile run format:check
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix mobile run typecheck
